appraisal_events.evidence: Le baron se vante d’un « article du Times » et d’un « dossier secret », puis profère « ces mots affreux et presque fous » au sujet de Bloch et des Juifs, en me serrant « le bras à me faire mal ».
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator frames Charlus's grandiloquent speech and antisemitic tirade as outraged and cruel, highlighting his blend of disdain, vanity, and malice; this significantly lowers his local value.

status_effects.explanation: His self-glorification and verbal violence, described by the narrator as 'terrible' and almost mad, make him appear morally and socially degraded in this passage.
